title: Kanban Plan — apply taste feedback to production profile
description: Use production taste/profile.yaml as single taste source; remove test taste fixture and rerun cognitive analysis.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Reflect user feedback about modern Russian cinema in production taste profile

DONE.task: Remove tests/fixtures taste YAML to enforce production-only taste source
DONE.notes: No tests should depend on this file

DONE.task: Rerun ct-cognetive with updated taste/profile.yaml and report result for movie 'Малыш'
DONE.notes: Use real fetched fixture in tests/fixtures/cognize_movies.raw.json
DONE.status_note: Completed: rerun done; 'Малыш' is now skip with score 10 and explicit modern russian cinema red flag.

DONE.task: Update taste/profile.yaml with explicit exclusion of modern Russian cinema and retro-only rule
DONE.notes: Add hard rules while preserving existing preferences
DONE.status_note: Completed: profile updated to version 1.1 with modern russian cinema exclusions and retro-era preferences.

acceptance_criteria: Production taste profile includes new exclusion rules
No taste yaml remains in tests/fixtures
ct-cognetive run with production taste file completes and outputs JSON
